page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An R Package for Extraction and Analysis of Cancer Mutational Signatures.

mutSignatures R package - dev version - 2.1.

Decipher Mutational Signatures from Somatic Mutational Catalogs.

Cancer cells accumulate DNA mutations as result of DNA damage and DNA repair processes.
